reasoning: After the resignation of Prime Minister Miloš Vučević on January 28, 2025, there were active demands for snap elections from protesters. However, President Aleksandar Vučić circumvented early elections by nominating Djuro Macut as Prime Minister on April 6, 2025, and forming a new cabinet which was approved by the parliament on April 16, 2025. During May and June 2025, Vučić and the ruling party flatly rejected protesters' demands for snap elections. An announcement to hold early elections in 2026 was later made by Vučić on December 28, 2025. Because this announcement occurred months after the July 1, 2025 resolution deadline, and there was no announcement of a specific election date prior to July 1, 2025, the resolution is clearly 'No'.
